# tsdbr

`tsdbr` is designed to create, populate, maintain and query SQLite
databases of environmental time series data.

## Utilisation

``` R
library(tsdbr)
conn <- ts_create_db(":memory:")
options(tsdbr.conn = conn)
ts_add_parameter("discharge", "cms")
ts_add_site("Niagara Falls")
ts_add_station("S1", "discharge", "Niagara Falls", "hour")
data <- data.frame(
  Station = "S1", DateTime = ISOdate(2000, 9, 1, 0:23),
  Recorded = 0:23 - 2,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
ts_add_data(data)
data <- ts_get_data(
  start_date = as.Date("2000-09-01"),
  end_date = as.Date("2000-09-02")
)
print(head(data))
#> # A tibble: 6 × 11
#>   Station DateTime            Recorded Corrected Status     Site          Depth Parameter Units StationName Comments
#>   <chr>   <dttm>                 <dbl>     <dbl> <ord>      <chr>         <dbl> <chr>     <chr> <chr>       <chr>   
#> 1 S1      2000-09-01 00:00:00       -2        -2 reasonable Niagara Falls    NA discharge cms   <NA>        <NA>    
#> 2 S1      2000-09-01 01:00:00       -1        -1 reasonable Niagara Falls    NA discharge cms   <NA>        <NA>    
#> 3 S1      2000-09-01 02:00:00        0         0 reasonable Niagara Falls    NA discharge cms   <NA>        <NA>    
#> 4 S1      2000-09-01 03:00:00        1         1 reasonable Niagara Falls    NA discharge cms   <NA>        <NA>    
#> 5 S1      2000-09-01 04:00:00        2         2 reasonable Niagara Falls    NA discharge cms   <NA>        <NA>    
#> 6 S1      2000-09-01 05:00:00        3         3 reasonable Niagara Falls    NA discharge cms   <NA>        <NA>
ts_plot_data(data)
```

![](reference/figures/README-unnamed-chunk-1-1.png)

``` R
ts_disconnect_db()
```

## Installation

To install the latest version from GitHub
[repository](https://github.com/poissonconsulting/tsdbr)

``` R
# install.packages("remotes")
remotes::install_github("poissonconsulting/tsdbr")
```

## Contribution

Please report any
[issues](https://github.com/poissonconsulting/tsdbr/issues).

[Pull requests](https://github.com/poissonconsulting/tsdbr/pulls) are
always welcome.

## Code of Conduct

Please note that the tsdbr project is released with a [Contributor Code
of
Conduct](https://contributor-covenant.org/version/2/0/CODE_OF_CONDUCT.html).
By contributing to this project, you agree to abide by its terms.

# Package index

## All functions

- [`ts_add_data()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/tsdbr/reference/ts_add_data.md)
  : Add Data
- [`ts_add_parameter()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/tsdbr/reference/ts_add_parameter.md)
  : Add Parameter
- [`ts_add_parameters()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/tsdbr/reference/ts_add_parameters.md)
  : Add Parameters
- [`ts_add_site()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/tsdbr/reference/ts_add_site.md)
  : Add Sites
- [`ts_add_sites()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/tsdbr/reference/ts_add_sites.md)
  : Add Site
- [`ts_add_station()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/tsdbr/reference/ts_add_station.md)
  : Add Station
- [`ts_add_stations()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/tsdbr/reference/ts_add_stations.md)
  : Add Stations
- [`ts_connect_db()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/tsdbr/reference/ts_connect_db.md)
  : Connect to Database
- [`ts_create_db()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/tsdbr/reference/ts_create_db.md)
  : Create Time-Series Database
- [`ts_delete_station()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/tsdbr/reference/ts_delete_station.md)
  : Delete Station
- [`ts_disconnect_db()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/tsdbr/reference/ts_disconnect_db.md)
  : Disconnect from Database
- [`ts_doctor_db()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/tsdbr/reference/ts_doctor_db.md)
  : Doctor Database
- [`ts_get_data()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/tsdbr/reference/ts_get_data.md)
  : Get Data
- [`ts_get_disclaimer()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/tsdbr/reference/ts_get_disclaimer.md)
  : Get Disclaimer
- [`ts_get_log()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/tsdbr/reference/ts_get_log.md)
  : Get Log Table
- [`ts_get_maintainer()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/tsdbr/reference/ts_get_maintainer.md)
  : Get Maintainer
- [`ts_get_parameters()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/tsdbr/reference/ts_get_parameters.md)
  : Get Parameter Table
- [`ts_get_sites()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/tsdbr/reference/ts_get_sites.md)
  : Get Site Table
- [`ts_get_stations()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/tsdbr/reference/ts_get_stations.md)
  : Get Stations Table
- [`ts_get_table()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/tsdbr/reference/ts_get_table.md)
  : Get Table
- [`ts_integer_to_status()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/tsdbr/reference/ts_integer_to_status.md)
  : Status to Integer
- [`ts_plot_data()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/tsdbr/reference/ts_plot_data.md)
  : Plot Data
- [`ts_set_disclaimer()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/tsdbr/reference/ts_set_disclaimer.md)
  : Set Disclaimer
- [`ts_set_maintainer()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/tsdbr/reference/ts_set_maintainer.md)
  : Set Maintainer
- [`ts_status_to_integer()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/tsdbr/reference/ts_status_to_integer.md)
  : Status to Integer
- [`ts_sys_user()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/tsdbr/reference/ts_sys_user.md)
  : System User
- [`ts_translate_stations()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/tsdbr/reference/ts_translate_stations.md)
  : Translate Stations
- [`ts_utc_offset_to_tz()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/tsdbr/reference/ts_utc_offset_to_tz.md)
  : UTC Offset to Time Zone
- [`ts_write_csv()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/tsdbr/reference/ts_write_csv.md)
  : Write csv
